Details: Oxidation of As(III) to As(V) can be very effective with ozone. Ozone pre-treatment can be used prior to removal of As(V) by other treatment technologies. In two bench-scale studies, greater than 95 percent conversion of As(III) to As(V) was observed for both surface water and formulated challenge water (with composition similar to ground water and surface water) samples. The ozone doses in these experiments varied from 0.1 to 0.8 milligrams per liter and the contact times were between 0.0033 and 2.2 minutes [172, 607].
